suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify error position convention: when an error originates from a file-based parse (ParseFile, processInclude), the file path should always be included in the position string (file:line:col), not just (line:col). Currently AGENTS.md says 'Error messages should include position info (file:line:col) where applicable' but does not specify that the file component is required when available.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature include-digest-verification: integrity check error at parse.go:580 uses (%d:%d) omitting source file path, while similar error at parse.go:156 includes fp in (%s:%d:%d) format.
